message:
feat(providers): add ExtensionStreamSimpleProvider for custom JS providers

Enable extensions to register custom LLM providers with a streamSimple
callback that the Rust runtime calls during agent loops:

src/providers/mod.rs:
- Update create_provider() signature to accept optional &ExtensionManager
  for resolving extension-registered providers
- Add ExtensionStreamSimpleProvider struct implementing Provider trait:
  - Builds JS-compatible model, context, and options objects
  - Calls extension's streamSimple function via JsExtensionRuntimeHandle
  - Translates streaming events (text, thinking, tool_use, error) back
    to Rust AssistantMessageEvents
  - Handles abort/cancel on stream completion
- Add ExtensionStreamSimpleState for managing active stream lifecycle
- Add vcr_client_if_enabled() helper for VCR-aware HTTP clients
- Add assistant_event_to_stream_event() for event type mapping

tests/extensions_provider_streaming.rs:
- Unit tests for thinking event translation, tool call events,
  string-only streaming, empty streams, error events
- Tests for context/options serialization fidelity

tests/provider_factory.rs:
- Update all create_provider() calls with new None second parameter
- Replace panic!() with assert!(false, ...) per project conventions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
